001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.text.Editable;
004import android.text.TextWatcher;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import android.widget.EditText;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.recyclerview.widget.DiffUtil;
010import androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter;
011import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
015import java.util.HashMap;
016import java.util.Map;
017import java.util.Objects;
018
019public class BulkCandlingGroupAdapter
020    extends ListAdapter<EggGroup, BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder> {
021
022  public interface OnInputFocusListener {
023    void onInputFocused(@NonNull EditText editText);
024  }
025
026  private final Map<Long, String> enteredValues = new HashMap<>();
027  private final OnInputFocusListener focusListener;
028
029  public BulkCandlingGroupAdapter(@NonNull OnInputFocusListener focusListener) {
030    super(DIFF_CALLBACK);
031    this.focusListener = focusListener;
032  }
033
034  @NonNull
035  @Override
036  public ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
037    ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding = ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding.inflate(
038        LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()), parent, false);
039    return new ViewHolder(binding);
040  }
041
042  @Override
043  public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull ViewHolder holder, int position) {
044    holder.bind(getItem(position));
045  }
046
047  public boolean hasAnyEnteredValue() {
048    for (EggGroup group : getCurrentList()) {
049      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
050      if (raw != null && !raw.isBlank()) {
051        return true;
052      }
053    }
054    return false;
055  }
056
057  @NonNull
058  public Map<Long, Integer> collectValidCounts() {
059    Map<Long, Integer> counts = new HashMap<>();
060    for (EggGroup group : getCurrentList()) {
061      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
062      if (raw == null || raw.isBlank()) {
063        continue;
064      }
065
066      int value = Integer.parseInt(raw);
067      int clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(value, group.getInitialEggCount()));
068      counts.put(group.getId(), clamped);
069    }
070    return counts;
071  }
072
073  public boolean validateInputs() {
074    boolean valid = true;
075    for (int i = 0; i < getCurrentList().size(); i++) {
076      EggGroup group = getCurrentList().get(i);
077      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
078      if (raw == null || raw.isBlank()) {
079        continue;
080      }
081      try {
082        int value = Integer.parseInt(raw);
083        if (value < 0 || value > group.getInitialEggCount()) {
084          valid = false;
085        }
086      } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
087        valid = false;
088      }
089    }
090    return valid;
091  }
092
093  class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder {
094
095    private final ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding;
096    private TextWatcher watcher;
097
098    ViewHolder(@NonNull ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding) {
099      super(binding.getRoot());
100      this.binding = binding;
101    }
102
103    void bind(@NonNull EggGroup group) {
104      binding.breedName.setText(group.getBreed());
105      binding.groupEggCount.setText(
106          itemView.getContext().getString(
107              R.string.label_group_egg_count, group.getInitialEggCount())
108      );
109
110      if (watcher != null) {
111        binding.viableCountInput.removeTextChangedListener(watcher);
112      }
113
114      String currentValue = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
115      binding.viableCountInput.setText(currentValue != null ? currentValue : "");
116      binding.viableCountInput.setHint(String.valueOf(group.getInitialEggCount()));
117      binding.viableCountInput.setError(null);
118
119      watcher = new TextWatcher() {
120        @Override
121        public void beforeTextChanged(CharSequence s, int start, int count, int after) {
122        }
123
124        @Override
125        public void onTextChanged(CharSequence s, int start, int before, int count) {
126        }
127
128        @Override
129        public void afterTextChanged(Editable s) {
130          enteredValues.put(group.getId(), s.toString().trim());
131        }
132      };
133      binding.viableCountInput.addTextChangedListener(watcher);
134
135      binding.viableCountInput.setOnClickListener(
136          v -> focusListener.onInputFocused(binding.viableCountInput));
137
138      binding.viableCountInput.setOnFocusChangeListener((v, hasFocus) -> {
139        if (hasFocus) {
140          focusListener.onInputFocused(binding.viableCountInput);
141        }
142      });
143    }
144  }
145
146  private static final DiffUtil.ItemCallback<EggGroup> DIFF_CALLBACK =
147      new DiffUtil.ItemCallback<>() {
148        @Override
149        public boolean areItemsTheSame(@NonNull EggGroup oldItem, @NonNull EggGroup newItem) {
150          return oldItem.getId() == newItem.getId();
151        }
152
153        @Override
154        public boolean areContentsTheSame(@NonNull EggGroup oldItem, @NonNull EggGroup newItem) {
155          return oldItem.getBatchId() == newItem.getBatchId()
156              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getBreed(), newItem.getBreed())
157              && oldItem.getInitialEggCount() == newItem.getInitialEggCount()
158              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getNotes(), newItem.getNotes());
159        }
160      };
161}
